title: Chopper Runs from the Invitation
description: On pages 15–18, chopper runs from the invitation as nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him.
scene: Chopper Runs from the Invitation. Nami recovers under Dr. Kureha’s care as Luffy becomes fascinated by Chopper and immediately tries to recruit him. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: W-Whoa, what're you getting all angry for?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: It'd fall down if the door closed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So that's why we can't close the door...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wait a sec... did that Reindeer talk just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ah! and was he walking on two legs...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: W-what the heck is he? He's fLuffy...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: walks on two legs... looks like a rein- deer...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Or grow big into a monster...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Sanji! Let's get him to join our crew!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There was one person who he opened up his wounded heart to... but that was long ago...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Wait right there, monster! Join our crew!

summary: This part centers on chopper runs from the invitation, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
